title: Ant's Weaponry
description: Need some extremely strong weapons? Then this mods just for you!
body:
[made to be played with enchancements]
![Replace this with a 
description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b0144a9b437bcb827787bf821c8314cce620e2a.png)

This mod aims to add multiple fun to use and powerful weapons to the game.

Weapons:
- Analecta Vitae
- Handcannon
- Rose Gold Dagger
- Sickle (currently unobtainable)

Materials:
- Rose Gold
- Dilarinite

Misc. Items:
- Cannonball
- Flying Cannonball
- Explosive Cannonball
- Dilarinite Block
- Rose Gold Block
- Rose Gilded Blackstone, Polished Blackstone Bricks, Chiseled Blackstone
- Rose Gold Nugget
- Amethyst Powder
- Impure Rose Gold


# The Analecta Vitae
The Analecta Vitae is a powerful weapon made to fight against hoards of mods or to be used in pvp.

When you right click, you attack everything in a 4x2x4 radius.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85c4db7489dbffbdd69c43c4bc00afc0a4c60f6e.gif)

Or, when you have the Surge enchantment, you fire a powerful Sonic Beam that damages everything in its path, knocking you and the enemies back.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bbdff876939cc5a19fc65b7d8023b7f6673e8e5.gif)

The Recipe: 
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb7c49c8343a4bd9963c2cc447be10f30ba4527a.png)

# The Handcannon
The Handcannon is (literally) a Handcannon.
It has 3 diffirent projectiles, which it can shoot.
### Cannonball
The Cannonball is a powerful, but slow projectile, which explodes when it hits an entity, and explodes weaker when it hits a block.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9ccd46d2e879be4f433099257fda568090c0e6f.gif)
### Flying Cannonball
The Flying Cannonball is a weaker, but much faster Cannonball.
(no gif for this one, will fix later)

### Explosive Cannonball
The Explosive Cannonball is literally just a cannonball that explodes.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e41d07573652578dbae4254a40036833f4f051ff.gif)

The Recipes:

# Rose Gold Dagger
The Rose Gold Dagger is a cheap and stackable weapon, which can be thrown and has a high piercing value.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdeb3d7cae915873622bf13b1edc10cf30ac536c.gif)

The Recipe:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddfaa5797c119b2d7638cf0bb28d6a2608445201.png)

# How to make Dilarinite 
(since it doesnt show up in jei)

1. Place down a diamond block.
2. Right click on it with 5 Iron in your main hand.
3. Right click on the Unfinished Dilarinite with Netherite to get 2-3 ingots of dilarinite.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcdc4e067dcfe5b181d88130b0b3d094dc7afb9f.gif)
